data.title: GREEN: add tier enforcement logic to record-review.sh
data.description:
## TDD Requirement
Make RED tests from task d7af-bb23 pass.

## Implementation
- Read last line of ARTIFACTS_DIR/classifier-telemetry.jsonl, parse selected_tier via python3
- Read review_tier from reviewer-findings.json (already parsed earlier in the script)
- Define tier rank function: light=1, standard=2, deep=3
- Compare: if review_tier rank < selected_tier rank → exit non-zero with error to stderr
- Error message: "TIER IMMUTABILITY VIOLATION: review tier '<review_tier>' is below classified tier '<selected_tier>'. Re-run /dso:review."
- On missing telemetry file or missing review_tier field: allow review, emit WARNING to stderr, write tier_verified=false in review-status file
- Do NOT add a separate lock file — read telemetry fresh each invocation

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Tier downgrade: record-review.sh exits non-zero when review_tier < selected_tier
- [ ] Tier match/upgrade: record-review.sh exits 0 when review_tier >= selected_tier
- [ ] Fail-open: record-review.sh exits 0 with warning when telemetry is absent
- [ ] tier_verified=false appears in review-status when telemetry is absent
